justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the user's preferred time and date, even with the user's initial hesitation, and successfully booked the appointment.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed the user's request and confirmed the booking in two turns, without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's request and confirming the appointment without any issues.
